items.question: What is Text to Image AI?
items.answer: Text to Image is an AI workflow that generates images from text descriptions. Simply describe what you want to see, and the AI creates a matching visual based on your prompt.

items.question: What kind of images can I generate?
items.answer: You can create virtually any type of image: illustrations, concept art, product mockups, landscapes, portraits, abstract art, and more. The key is writing clear, descriptive prompts.

items.question: How do I write a good prompt?
items.answer: Describe the subject, style, composition, colors, mood, and any specific details. For example: 'A modern minimalist living room with large windows, warm lighting, and indoor plants, photographed in architectural magazine style.' The more specific, the better.

items.question: Can I control the style and quality?
items.answer: Yes. In your prompt, specify the artistic style (photorealistic, illustration, watercolor, 3D render, etc.), quality level, and other parameters. You can also generate multiple versions to explore different interpretations.

items.question: Can I use AI-generated images commercially?
items.answer: Commercial usage depends on your OpenCreator plan and the AI model's terms. Review your account's usage rights and any model-specific guidelines before using images in commercial projects.

items.question: How does credit usage work?
items.answer: Each image generation consumes credits based on the model, resolution, and settings. You can check your credit balance and adjust parameters to manage usage within your plan.
